comments.author: @carlosmunoz7121
comments.text: and there it is...so sad....a people that eat too much!  I highly suspect this is a pattern in Puerto Rico...Breakfast at 7 am.... snacking round 9 am to 10 am.....thinking about lunch and lilkely eating at 12 noon..... continuing with a coffee and a sweet and repeating this around 2pm, 3pm.... driving out from work likely between 4 to 5 pm....and moving on to dinning around 7pm for many....following by sitting to watch insipid and stupid news on TV....please, if you see yourself in this observations do yourself a favor: eat only when you feel hungry! Can you please my dear people! This over eating not only creates obesity, but has most of the island's people diabetic! Discipline we have none!!!
